meta.homeTitle: Study Time Manager — Plan your IU semester
meta.homeDescription: Track your IU study time efficiently. Plan modules, log study sessions, and analyze your progress. Perfect for IU dual students.
meta.aboutDescription: Learn more about Study Time Manager, built for IU dual students.
meta.loginDescription: Sign in to your Study Time Manager account.
meta.registerDescription: Create a free Study Time Manager account and start tracking your study time.
meta.forgotPasswordDescription: Reset your Study Time Manager account password.
meta.resetPasswordTitle: Set New Password — Study Time Manager
meta.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for your Study Time Manager account.
meta.dashboardDescription: Your personal study dashboard. Track modules, sessions, goals and achievements.
meta.imprintDescription: Imprint and legal information for the Study Time Manager.
meta.privacyDescription: Privacy Policy of Study Time Manager. Information on the processing of personal data.
meta.termsTitle: Terms of Service — Study Time Manager
meta.termsDescription: Terms of Service for the Study Time Manager.

home.headline: Plan your study time, track your focus, and hit your semester goals.
home.subheadline: Study Time Manager helps you break down six-month workload targets into monthly plans and weekly sessions, then compare your plan against real study time with one clear timeline.
home.feature1Description: Define measurable learning goals for the semester and keep each target visible.
home.feature2Description: Track sessions and compare planned vs actual learning blocks.
home.feature3Description: Visualize invested time, goal completion, and achievements.
home.feature4Description: Detect missed plans and inactivity directly in the dashboard, without notification dependencies.
home.scopeItem1: Six-month goal and rough planning workflow
home.scopeItem2: One-month detailed planning with intermediate goals
home.scopeItem3: Session timer for focused learning time
home.scopeItem4: Delivery tracking for modules, exams, and submissions

about.title: Study Time Manager
about.description: This project is a practical prototype for students in demanding study programs. It supports long-term planning, detailed monthly scheduling, focused session tracking, and continuous reflection on whether learning goals are being reached.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.name: Name
imprint.advertisingNoticeText: Unsolicited advertising emails are not permitted.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s2_text: We process personal data only to operate and provide the service.
privacy.s3_text1: The service is operated on servers of external hosting providers (e.g. Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, Zap-Hosting). These providers supply the technical infrastructure and may process personal data such as IP addresses, server logs and database contents in the course of technical service provision.
privacy.s5_text1: We use only strictly necessary cookies and local storage required for:
privacy.s5_text2: No tracking, analytics or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.s5_text3: We use only strictly necessary cookies and local storage technologies.
privacy.s5_legal: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR and § 25(2) No. 2 TDDDG
privacy.s8_text1: Data is stored as long as the account exists.
privacy.s8_text3: Backups may be retained for a limited period due to technical constraints. A fixed deletion schedule for backups is not guaranteed.
privacy.s9_item3: Legal authorities if required by law
privacy.s9_text2: No sale or marketing use of data.
privacy.s10_text2: Requests are processed as quickly as possible, at the latest within 30 days of receipt (Art. 12(3) GDPR).
privacy.s11_text1: State Commissioner for Data Protection NRW
privacy.s11_text2: Competent supervisory authority for North Rhine-Westphalia
privacy.s12_text1: We apply technical and organisational security measures to protect data.
privacy.s12_text2: We implement appropriate measures in line with the state of the art. However, absolute security cannot be guaranteed for internet-based systems.
privacy.s13_text1: The service is not intended for users under 16 years.
privacy.s13_text2: If such data becomes known, it will be deleted.
privacy.s14_text1: This policy may be updated at any time.
privacy.s14_text2: Latest version is always available on the service website.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_text: The service is a free web application for study planning and learning management.
terms.s2_text: Users must be at least 16 years old and agree to lawful use only.
terms.s5_text: Users retain rights to their content but grant necessary rights for service operation.
terms.s6_text: The service is provided "as is" without warranty. Liability is limited to intent and gross negligence to the extent permitted by law.
terms.s6_item1: No entitlement to data backup or data preservation by the operator.
terms.s6_item3: No damages for data loss, except in cases of intent or gross negligence.
terms.s6_item4: The operator is not liable for third-party content or external links.
terms.s7_text: Accounts can be deleted or suspended in case of abuse or at user request.
terms.s8_text: The service may be discontinued at any time. There is no legal entitlement to prior notice or continued operation.
